review_actions.approach: Implement outlier detection and enforce business rule validations using thresholds and constraints.
review_actions.reason: Outliers and rule violations are causing inaccuracies in calculations and reporting.
sql_queries: ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_PRICE_UOM_range CHECK (PRICE_UOM BETWEEN 0 AND 999999999);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_DIFFERENTIAL_PRICE_USD_MT_range CHECK (DIFFERENTIAL_PRICE_USD_MT BETWEEN 0 AND 999999999);

review_actions.approach: Implement data validation rules, enforce mandatory fields, and backfill missing values using domain knowledge or reference data.
review_actions.reason: Missing values impact data integrity, reporting accuracy, and downstream processes.
sql_queries: ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_COMP_CODE_not_null CHECK (COMP_CODE IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_COMP_CODE_NAME_not_null CHECK (COMP_CODE_NAME IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_TARGET_COMP_CODE_not_null CHECK (TARGET_COMP_CODE IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_TARGET_COMP_CODE_NAME_not_null CHECK (TARGET_COMP_CODE_NAME IS NOT NULL);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_PRODUCT_CLUSTER_not_null CHECK (PRODUCT_CLUSTER IS NOT NULL);

review_actions.approach: Implement automated data refresh mechanisms and validate ETL processes to ensure timely updates.
review_actions.reason: Data is outdated due to delayed ETL processes or missing refresh schedules, impacting decision-making and reporting accuracy.
sql_queries: ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_CONTRACT_DATE_not_future CHECK (CONTRACT_DATE <= CURRENT_DATE);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_CONTRACT_DATE_YM_not_future CHECK (CONTRACT_DATE_YM <= CURRENT_DATE);
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_CONTRACT_DATE_YR_not_future CHECK (CONTRACT_DATE_YR <= CURRENT_DATE);

review_actions.approach: Identify and remove duplicate records, enforce primary key constraints, and validate unique values in the specified columns.
review_actions.reason: Duplicate values and primary key violations reduce data integrity and hinder accurate analysis.
sql_queries: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_CONTRACT_NO_unique ON data_table(CONTRACT_NO);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_INTERNAL_REFERENCE_unique ON data_table(INTERNAL_REFERENCE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_CONTRACT_DATE_unique ON data_table(CONTRACT_DATE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_SHIPMENT_START_DATE_unique ON data_table(SHIPMENT_START_DATE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_DELIVERY_START_DATE_unique ON data_table(DELIVERY_START_DATE);

review_actions.approach: Standardize naming conventions and ensure accessibility compliance (e.g., consistent casing, removal of special characters, and alignment with accessibility guidelines).
review_actions.reason: Inconsistent naming conventions and accessibility issues hinder usability and data interpretation.
sql_queries: ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_COMP_CODE_NAME_standardized CHECK (COMP_CODE_NAME = UPPER(TRIM(COMP_CODE_NAME)));
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_TARGET_COMP_CODE_NAME_standardized CHECK (TARGET_COMP_CODE_NAME = UPPER(TRIM(TARGET_COMP_CODE_NAME)));
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_DOC_TYPE_TEXT_standardized CHECK (DOC_TYPE_TEXT = UPPER(TRIM(DOC_TYPE_TEXT)));
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_BUSINESS_AREA_NAME_standardized CHECK (BUSINESS_AREA_NAME = UPPER(TRIM(BUSINESS_AREA_NAME)));
ALTER TABLE data_table ADD CONSTRAINT chk_PROFIT_CTR_NAME_standardized CHECK (PROFIT_CTR_NAME = UPPER(TRIM(PROFIT_CTR_NAME)));
